reference: You can take this medicine as soon as the pregnancy is confirmed in a normal pregnancy without treatment until twelve weeks. One tablet twice daily is safe during pregnancy. In case of a pregnancy that has been treated for infertility, you can start after your doctor indicates that ovulation has occurred.
text: You can take this medicine as soon as the pregnancy is confirmed. In a normal pregnancy, without treatment, until twelve weeks, one tablet twice daily is safe during pregnancy. In case of a pregnancy that has been treated for infertility, you can start after your indicates that ovulation has occurred.
